narrative:
Cincinnati 5-I (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,327 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a clear Republican lean of 8.7 percentage points.
